exhibits.name: State Administrators and Agents for Service of Process
exhibits.notes: Lists state agencies and agents for 15 states: CA, HI, IL, IN, MD, MI, MN, NY, ND, OR, RI, SD, VA, WA, WI.

exhibits.name: Franchise Agreement
exhibits.notes: 77-page franchise agreement with 18 sections plus exhibits (Guaranty of Performance, Security Agreement, EFT Authorization, Provider Compliance Agreement). Contains all operative terms including royalty calculation, territory, non-compete, termination, mediation/arbitration, IP restrictions.

exhibits.name: Agreement and Conditional Consent to Transfer
exhibits.notes: Form of transfer agreement. Required when franchisee sells store.

exhibits.name: Ascentium Capital LLC Equipment Finance Agreement
exhibits.notes: Sample EFA and Prepayment Addendum from Ascentium (division of Regions Bank). Terms: 12-60 months, 8.5%-10.5% rates, prepayment fee 1%-5%, late fee 10%, default interest 18%/year. Venue: Jefferson County, Alabama.

exhibits.name: Addendum Re: Data Protection and Security
exhibits.notes: Data protection addendum re: Personal Information (Massachusetts template). Compliance with federal/state data privacy requirements.

exhibits.name: Roster of Franchisees
exhibits.notes: ~20 pages. Lists all 745 operating franchised stores by state with entity name, address, phone. Also lists signed-but-not-opened locations.

exhibits.name: Financial Statements
exhibits.notes: Audited consolidated financial statements for years ended 12/31/2024, 2023, 2022. Includes: Independent Auditor's Report (unqualified, dated March 25, 2025), Balance Sheets, Statements of Income, Statements of Member's Equity, Statements of Cash Flows, Notes (11 notes). Auditor based in Indianapolis.

exhibits.name: State Addenda and Agreement Riders
exhibits.notes: 43 pages. State-specific addenda for: California, Hawaii, Illinois, Indiana, Maryland, Michigan (front matter), Minnesota, New York, North Dakota, Rhode Island, South Dakota, Virginia, Washington, Wisconsin. Material overrides to non-compete, choice of law/forum, termination, release requirements.

exhibits.name: Franchisee Disclosure Questionnaire
exhibits.notes: Standard form questionnaire for prospective franchisees.
